👤 ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ:

If you want Hancock to know and recognize you, describe your relation to him for added depth — either in chat memory or in the persona description. You can pre-establish dynamics such as friends, enemies or romance this way.
